hero.title: Discover High Protein Foods
hero.subtitle: Discover 120+ high protein foods with complete nutrition data per 100g. Your ultimate high protein foods list for weight loss, muscle building, and a healthy high protein diet. Includes macros, prices, and protein rich foods from every category.
features.label: Why Choose HighProtein Foodz
features.title: The Most Complete High Protein Foods List — Macros, Micros & Prices
features.macros.title: Complete Macros & Micros
features.macros.desc: Protein, calories, carbs, fat, and fiber per 100g for every high protein food. Plus 21 micronutrients including vitamin D, iron, zinc, and B12.
features.price.title: Price Tracking
features.price.desc: Average prices included so you can find the best high protein foods for weight loss and muscle building that fit your budget.
features.sorting.title: Smart Sorting
features.sorting.desc: Sort by protein content, calories, protein per dollar, and more. Find the highest protein foods per 100g instantly.
features.filter.title: Filter & Search
features.filter.desc: Filter by meat, seafood, dairy, plant-based, or supplements. Find protein rich foods for every diet and preference.
foodgrid.title: Browse All Foods
foodgrid.empty.title: No foods found
foodgrid.empty.desc: Try adjusting your search or filters
footer.desc: Your free resource for discovering protein-rich foods. Data sourced from USDA FoodData Central (fdc.nal.usda.gov).
food.chicken-breast.name: Chicken Breast (Cooked)
food.chicken-breast.desc: Lean, versatile protein source. Skinless breast is lowest in fat.
food.turkey-breast.name: Turkey Breast (Cooked)
food.turkey-breast.desc: Extra lean poultry with one of the highest protein-to-fat ratios.
food.lean-ground-beef.name: Lean Ground Beef (90/10, Cooked)
food.lean-ground-beef.desc: Versatile high-protein red meat, perfect for burgers and tacos.
food.beef-sirloin.name: Beef Sirloin Steak (Cooked)
food.beef-sirloin.desc: Leaner cut of beef with robust flavor and tenderness.
food.pork-tenderloin.name: Pork Tenderloin (Cooked)
food.pork-tenderloin.desc: Extra-lean cut of pork, as lean as chicken breast.
food.lamb-chop.name: Lamb Chop (Lean, Cooked)
food.lamb-chop.desc: Tender, premium cut with distinctive rich flavor.
food.bison.name: Bison/Buffalo (Cooked)
food.bison.desc: Lean game meat, lower in fat than beef with rich mineral profile.
food.chicken-thigh.name: Chicken Thigh (Skinless, Cooked)
food.chicken-thigh.desc: Juicier than breast with more flavor, still high in protein.
food.venison.name: Venison (Deer, Cooked)
food.venison.desc: Ultra-lean wild game with exceptional protein density.
food.pork-chops.name: Pork Chops (Center Cut, Cooked)
food.pork-chops.desc: Classic cut, a balance of lean meat and marbling.
food.beef-jerky.name: Beef Jerky (Cooked)
food.beef-jerky.desc: Concentrated protein source, shelf-stable and portable.
food.ground-turkey.name: Ground Turkey (93/7, Cooked)
food.ground-turkey.desc: Leaner alternative to ground beef with mild flavor.
food.sirloin-steak.name: Beef Sirloin Steak (Cooked)
food.sirloin-steak.desc: Flavorful, affordable steak cut with good marbling.
food.beef-liver.name: Beef Liver (Cooked)
food.beef-liver.desc: The most nutrient-dense food, exceptionally high in vitamin A and B12.
food.duck-breast.name: Duck Breast (Skinless, Cooked)
food.duck-breast.desc: Rich, flavorful poultry with crispy skin potential.
food.rabbit-meat.name: Rabbit (Cooked)
food.rabbit-meat.desc: Ultra-lean white meat, similar to chicken but more delicate.
food.veal-cutlet.name: Veal Cutlet (Cooked)
food.veal-cutlet.desc: Tender, mild-flavored meat from young cattle.
food.goat-meat.name: Goat Meat (Cooked)
food.goat-meat.desc: Popular worldwide lean red meat with distinctive flavor.
food.chicken-liver.name: Chicken Liver (Cooked)
food.chicken-liver.desc: Extremely nutrient-dense organ meat, packed with iron and B12.
food.beef-brisket.name: Beef Brisket (Cooked)
food.beef-brisket.desc: Tough cut that becomes tender through slow cooking, rich flavor.
food.pork-shoulder.name: Pork Shoulder (Cooked)
food.pork-shoulder.desc: Marbled cut ideal for pulled pork, roasting, and braising.
food.pork-belly.name: Pork Belly (Cooked)
food.pork-belly.desc: Rich, indulgent cut with crispy skin when roasted.
food.turkey-thigh.name: Turkey Thigh (Skinless, Cooked)
food.turkey-thigh.desc: Juicier dark meat alternative to turkey breast.
food.beef-tongue.name: Beef Tongue (Cooked)
food.beef-tongue.desc: Tender organ meat with rich, beefy flavor.
food.lamb-shoulder.name: Lamb Shoulder (Cooked)
food.lamb-shoulder.desc: Flavorful cut perfect for braising and slow roasting.
food.cornish-hen.name: Cornish Hen (Cooked)
food.cornish-hen.desc: Small, tender bird with delicate flavor, perfect for individual servings.
food.quail.name: Quail (Cooked)
food.quail.desc: Delicate game bird with tender, flavorful meat.
food.goose.name: Goose (Cooked)
food.goose.desc: Rich, dark poultry with crispy skin, traditionally for festive occasions.
food.chicken-gizzards.name: Chicken Gizzards (Cooked)
food.chicken-gizzards.desc: Chewy, flavorful organ meat that shines in stews and fried dishes.
food.beef-heart.name: Beef Heart (Cooked)
food.beef-heart.desc: Nutrient-dense lean organ meat with bold flavor.
food.salmon.name: Salmon (Wild Caught)
food.salmon.desc: Fatty fish rich in omega-3s and vitamin D.
food.tuna.name: Tuna (Canned in Water)
food.tuna.desc: Budget-friendly canned fish, extremely high in protein.
food.shrimp.name: Shrimp
food.cod.name: Cod (Atlantic)
food.cod.desc: Mild, flaky white fish, very low in fat.
food.tilapia.name: Tilapia
food.tilapia.desc: Mild, affordable white fish that adapts to any seasoning.
food.sardines.name: Sardines (Canned in Oil)
food.sardines.desc: Small, nutrient-packed fish eaten whole for maximum benefit.
food.halibut.name: Halibut
food.halibut.desc: Firm, meaty white fish with mild sweet flavor.
food.scallops.name: Scallops
food.scallops.desc: Sweet, tender shellfish, quick to cook and elegant.
food.crab.name: Crab (Blue)
food.crab.desc: Sweet, delicate shellfish meat, a seafood delicacy.
food.lobster.name: Lobster
food.lobster.desc: Premium shellfish, lean protein with rich, indulgent taste.
food.mackerel.name: Mackerel (Atlantic)
food.mackerel.desc: Omega-3 powerhouse, one of the richest sources of vitamin D.
food.tuna-steak.name: Tuna Steak (Yellowfin)
food.tuna-steak.desc: Meaty, steak-like fish, excellent for grilling.
food.clams.name: Clams (Canned)
food.clams.desc: Iron and B12 powerhouse, incredibly nutrient-dense shellfish.
food.trout.name: Trout (Rainbow)
food.trout.desc: Delicate freshwater fish rich in omega-3s.
food.haddock.name: Haddock
food.haddock.desc: Mild white fish perfect for fish and chips.
food.catfish.name: Catfish
food.catfish.desc: Firm, mild freshwater fish popular in Southern cuisine.
food.sea-bass.name: Sea Bass
food.sea-bass.desc: Premium white fish with buttery flavor and firm texture.
food.snapper.name: Snapper
food.snapper.desc: Sweet, nutty-flavored white fish prized for grilling.
food.swordfish.name: Swordfish
food.swordfish.desc: Meaty, firm-textured fish that holds up well on the grill.
food.octopus.name: Octopus
food.octopus.desc: Tender mollusk popular in Mediterranean and Asian cuisines.
food.mussels.name: Mussels
food.mussels.desc: Inexpensive, sustainable shellfish with rich flavor.
food.oysters.name: Oysters
food.oysters.desc: Nutrient powerhouse exceptionally high in zinc and iron.
food.anchovies.name: Anchovies
food.anchovies.desc: Tiny, intensely savory fish packed with umami flavor.
food.eel.name: Eel (Unagi)
food.eel.desc: Rich, fatty fish prized in Japanese cuisine for its sweet glaze.
food.mahi-mahi.name: Mahi-Mahi
food.mahi-mahi.desc: Firm, lean fish with mild sweet flavor, also called dolphinfish.
food.squid.name: Squid (Calamari)
food.squid.desc: Versatile seafood with tender texture when cooked quickly.
food.perch.name: Perch
food.perch.desc: Sweet, flaky freshwater fish popular in North America and Europe.
food.barramundi.name: Barramundi
food.barramundi.desc: Sustainable white fish with buttery flavor and firm texture.
food.crayfish.name: Crayfish
food.crayfish.desc: Freshwater crustacean similar to mini lobster, popular in boils.
food.monkfish.name: Monkfish
food.monkfish.desc: Firm, lobster-like white fish known as poor man's lobster.
food.eggs.name: Whole Eggs
food.eggs.desc: Nature's multivitamin. Complete protein with yolks intact.
food.egg-whites.name: Egg Whites
food.egg-whites.desc: Nearly pure protein, virtually fat-free. Highest protein efficiency.
food.greek-yogurt.name: Greek Yogurt (Nonfat, Plain)
food.greek-yogurt.desc: Thick, strained yogurt with nearly double the protein of regular yogurt.
food.cottage-cheese.name: Cottage Cheese (1% Milkfat)
food.cottage-cheese.desc: Versatile fresh cheese packed with slow-digesting casein protein.
food.mozzarella.name: Mozzarella (Part-Skim)
food.mozzarella.desc: Classic melting cheese, good source of calcium and protein.
food.parmesan.name: Parmesan Cheese
food.parmesan.desc: Aged hard cheese, intensely savory with concentrated protein.
food.cheddar.name: Cheddar Cheese
food.cheddar.desc: Sharp, rich cheese that adds flavor to any dish.
food.milk.name: Milk (2% Reduced Fat)
food.milk.desc: Affordable complete protein with calcium and vitamin D fortification.
food.ricotta.name: Ricotta Cheese (Part-Skim)
food.ricotta.desc: Creamy Italian cheese, versatile for both sweet and savory dishes.
food.feta.name: Feta Cheese
food.feta.desc: Tangy, salty Greek cheese traditionally made from sheep milk.
food.swiss-cheese.name: Swiss Cheese
food.swiss-cheese.desc: Alpine cheese with characteristic holes, rich and nutty flavor.
food.buttermilk.name: Buttermilk
food.buttermilk.desc: Tangy cultured dairy liquid, great for baking and marinades.
food.heavy-cream.name: Heavy Cream
food.heavy-cream.desc: Rich, decadent cream for sauces, desserts, and whipped toppings.
food.sour-cream.name: Sour Cream
food.sour-cream.desc: Tangy, creamy condiment essential for dips and baked potatoes.
food.cream-cheese.name: Cream Cheese
food.cream-cheese.desc: Smooth, spreadable cheese perfect for bagels and cheesecake.
food.goat-cheese.name: Goat Cheese (Chevre)
food.goat-cheese.desc: Tangy, creamy cheese with distinctive earthy flavor.
food.blue-cheese.name: Blue Cheese
food.blue-cheese.desc: Pungent, tangy cheese with distinctive blue veins.
food.gouda.name: Gouda Cheese
food.gouda.desc: Smooth, nutty Dutch cheese that ages beautifully.
food.havarti.name: Havarti Cheese
food.havarti.desc: Creamy Danish cheese with buttery, mild flavor.
food.provolone.name: Provolone Cheese
food.provolone.desc: Semi-hard Italian cheese with sharp, tangy profile.
food.monterey-jack.name: Monterey Jack Cheese
food.monterey-jack.desc: Mild, semi-soft American cheese that melts beautifully.
food.colby-cheese.name: Colby Cheese
food.colby-cheese.desc: Mild, slightly sweet American cheese similar to cheddar.
food.mascarpone.name: Mascarpone Cheese
food.mascarpone.desc: Italian double-cream cheese, essential for tiramisu.
food.quark.name: Quark
food.quark.desc: High-protein fresh cheese with creamy texture, popular in Europe.
food.skyr.name: Skyr (Icelandic Yogurt)
food.skyr.desc: Thick, strained Icelandic dairy product, even thicker than Greek yogurt.
food.kefir.name: Kefir
food.kefir.desc: Fermented milk beverage rich in probiotics and digestible protein.
food.duck-eggs.name: Duck Eggs
food.duck-eggs.desc: Richer, larger eggs with more omega-3 and fat than chicken eggs.
food.quail-eggs.name: Quail Eggs
food.quail-eggs.desc: Petite, nutrient-dense eggs with a rich, creamy yolk.
food.powdered-milk.name: Powdered Milk
food.powdered-milk.desc: Concentrated dry milk with long shelf life, high in protein.
food.condensed-milk.name: Sweetened Condensed Milk
food.condensed-milk.desc: Thick, sweet dairy concentrate essential for desserts and coffee.
food.tofu.name: Tofu (Firm)
food.tofu.desc: Versatile soy-based protein that absorbs surrounding flavors.
food.tempeh.name: Tempeh
food.tempeh.desc: Fermented soybean cake with firm texture and nutty flavor.
food.edamame.name: Edamame
food.edamame.desc: Young soybeans, a complete plant protein with fiber.
food.lentils.name: Lentils (Cooked)
food.lentils.desc: Quick-cooking legume, excellent source of folate and iron.
food.chickpeas.name: Chickpeas (Cooked)
food.chickpeas.desc: Versatile legume, base of hummus and countless dishes.
food.black-beans.name: Black Beans (Cooked)
food.black-beans.desc: Protein-rich legume staple of Latin American cuisine.
food.quinoa.name: Quinoa (Cooked)
food.quinoa.desc: Ancient grain, complete protein with all essential amino acids.
food.almonds.name: Almonds
food.almonds.desc: Highest calcium nut, packed with healthy fats and vitamin E.
food.peanuts.name: Peanuts (Dry Roasted)
food.peanuts.desc: Affordable legume (not a nut) with impressive protein content.
food.peanut-butter.name: Peanut Butter (Natural)
food.peanut-butter.desc: Creamy, protein-rich spread, a classic favorite.
food.walnuts.name: Walnuts
food.walnuts.desc: Best plant source of omega-3 fatty acids (ALA).
food.cashews.name: Cashews
food.cashews.desc: Creamy nut rich in minerals, especially copper and magnesium.
food.pistachios.name: Pistachios
food.pistachios.desc: Colorful nut with complete protein profile, highest in vitamin B6.
food.hemp-seeds.name: Hemp Seeds
food.hemp-seeds.desc: Complete plant protein with perfect omega-3 to omega-6 ratio.
food.chia-seeds.name: Chia Seeds
food.chia-seeds.desc: Gel-forming seed extremely high in fiber and omega-3s.
food.seitan.name: Seitan (Wheat Gluten)
food.seitan.desc: Wheat-based meat substitute with the highest plant protein density.
food.pumpkin-seeds.name: Pumpkin Seeds (Pepitas)
food.pumpkin-seeds.desc: One of the best plant sources of zinc and magnesium.
food.oats.name: Oats (Rolled)
food.oats.desc: Whole grain with beta-glucan fiber that supports heart health.
food.spinach.name: Spinach (Cooked)
food.spinach.desc: Leafy green powerhouse, rich in iron, vitamin K, and folate.
food.broccoli.name: Broccoli (Cooked)
food.broccoli.desc: Cruciferous vegetable with sulforaphane and high vitamin C.
food.green-peas.name: Green Peas (Cooked)
food.green-peas.desc: Starchy vegetable with surprising protein content.
food.sweet-corn.name: Sweet Corn (Cooked)
food.sweet-corn.desc: Sweet, versatile grain-vegetable hybrid, rich in fiber.
food.brussels-sprouts.name: Brussels Sprouts (Cooked)
food.brussels-sprouts.desc: Mini cabbage relatives packed with vitamin K and C.
food.asparagus.name: Asparagus (Cooked)
food.asparagus.desc: Premium spring vegetable, natural diuretic rich in folate.
food.mushrooms.name: Mushrooms (White, Cooked)
food.mushrooms.desc: Only plant source of vitamin D (when UV-exposed).
food.hummus.name: Hummus
food.hummus.desc: Creamy chickpea-tahini spread, a complete protein when paired with grains.
food.soy-milk.name: Soy Milk (Fortified)
food.soy-milk.desc: Popular dairy alternative, often fortified to match milk nutrition.
food.nutritional-yeast.name: Nutritional Yeast
food.nutritional-yeast.desc: Deactivated yeast with cheesy flavor, fortified with B vitamins.
food.kidney-beans.name: Kidney Beans (Cooked)
food.kidney-beans.desc: Fiber-rich legume with hearty texture, perfect for chili and stews.
food.sunflower-seeds.name: Sunflower Seeds
food.sunflower-seeds.desc: Nutrient-dense seeds rich in vitamin E and selenium.
food.whey-protein.name: Whey Protein Isolate
food.whey-protein.desc: Fast-digesting, complete protein ideal for post-workout recovery.
food.soy-protein.name: Soy Protein Isolate
food.soy-protein.desc: Plant-based complete protein, comparable to whey in quality.
food.casein-protein.name: Casein Protein
food.casein-protein.desc: Slow-digesting dairy protein, ideal for nighttime recovery.
